'''âb-r-t''' ('''barata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stamp|stamp]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-r-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stamp|stamp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-r-t
|-
! Lemma
| barata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:baratithi|baratithi]] || [[word:baratiji|baratiji]] || [[word:baratishi|baratishi]] || [[word:barati|barati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:baratuthuth|baratuthuth]] || [[word:baratujuj|baratujuj]] || [[word:baratushush|baratushush]] || [[word:barat|barat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:baratuthu|baratuthu]] || [[word:baratuju|baratuju]] || [[word:baratushu|baratushu]] || [[word:baratu|baratu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:baratufuth|baratufuth]] || [[word:baratufuj|baratufuj]] || [[word:baratufush|baratufush]] || [[word:baratuf|baratuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:baratethe|baratethe]] || [[word:barateje|barateje]] || [[word:barateshe|barateshe]] || [[word:barate|barate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:baratothoth|baratothoth]] || [[word:baratojoj|baratojoj]] || [[word:baratoshosh|baratoshosh]] || [[word:barat|barat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:baratotho|baratotho]] || [[word:baratojo|baratojo]] || [[word:baratosho|baratosho]] || [[word:barato|barato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:baratofoth|baratofoth]] || [[word:baratofoj|baratofoj]] || [[word:baratofosh|baratofosh]] || [[word:baratof|baratof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:baratĂŠthĂŠ|baratĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:baratĂŠjĂŠ|baratĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:baratĂŠshĂŠ|baratĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:baratĂŠ|baratĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:baratathath|baratathath]] || [[word:baratajaj|baratajaj]] || [[word:baratashash|baratashash]] || [[word:barat|barat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:baratatha|baratatha]] || [[word:barataja|barataja]] || [[word:baratasha|baratasha]] || [[word:barata|barata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:baratafath|baratafath]] || [[word:baratafaj|baratafaj]] || [[word:baratafash|baratafash]] || [[word:barataf|barataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:baratasha|baratasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobaratasha|gobaratasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibaratasha|gokibaratasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:baratnĂŒsha|baratnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobaratnknĂŒsha|gobaratnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibaratnĂŒsha|gokibaratnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:baratshĂ«sha|baratshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobaratnkshĂ«sha|gobaratnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibaratshĂ«sha|gokibaratshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:baratrosha|baratrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobaratnkrosha|gobaratnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibaratrosha|gokibaratrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:baratmusha|baratmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobaratnkmusha|gobaratnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibaratmusha|gokibaratmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:baratsherasha|baratsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobaratnksherasha|gobaratnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibaratsherasha|gokibaratsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:baratngasha|baratngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobaratnkngasha|gobaratnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibaratngasha|gokibaratngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:baratyasha|baratyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobaratnkyasha|gobaratnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibaratyasha|gokibaratyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:baratyamasha|baratyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobaratnkyamasha|gobaratnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibaratyamasha|gokibaratyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:baratnĂŒshĂ«sha|baratnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobaratnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gobaratnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibaratnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokibaratnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:baratnĂŒrosha|baratnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobaratnknĂŒrosha|gobaratnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibaratnĂŒrosha|gokibaratnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:baratnĂŒmusha|baratnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobaratnknĂŒmusha|gobaratnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibaratnĂŒmusha|gokibaratnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:baratshĂ«nĂŒsha|baratshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobaratnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gobaratnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibaratshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokibaratshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:baratshĂ«rosha|baratshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobaratnkshĂ«rosha|gobaratnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibaratshĂ«rosha|gokibaratshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:baratshĂ«musha|baratshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobaratnkshĂ«musha|gobaratnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibaratshĂ«musha|gokibaratshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:baratronĂŒsha|baratronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobaratnkronĂŒsha|gobaratnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibaratronĂŒsha|gokibaratronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:baratroshĂ«sha|baratroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobaratnkroshĂ«sha|gobaratnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibaratroshĂ«sha|gokibaratroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:baratromusha|baratromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobaratnkromusha|gobaratnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibaratromusha|gokibaratromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:baratmunĂŒsha|baratmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobaratnkmunĂŒsha|gobaratnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibaratmunĂŒsha|gokibaratmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:baratmushĂ«sha|baratmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobaratnkmushĂ«sha|gobaratnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibaratmushĂ«sha|gokibaratmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:baratmurosha|baratmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobaratnkmurosha|gobaratnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibaratmurosha|gokibaratmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:barat|barat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:bĂŠrĂŠt|bĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobarat|hobarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hobĂŠrĂŠt|hobĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobarat|hohobarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobĂŠrĂŠt|hohobĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒbarat|nĂŒbarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒbĂŠrĂŠt|nĂŒbĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbarat|nĂŒnĂŒbarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠrĂŠt|nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻbarat|nĂŻbarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻbĂŠrĂŠt|nĂŻbĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbarat|nĂŻnĂŻbarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠrĂŠt|nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubarat|lubarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lubĂŠrĂŠt|lubĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubarat|lulubarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubĂŠrĂŠt|lulubĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libarat|libarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:libĂŠrĂŠt|libĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibarat|lilibarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibĂŠrĂŠt|lilibĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobarat|kobarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kobĂŠrĂŠt|kobĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobarat|kokobarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobĂŠrĂŠt|kokobĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebarat|kebarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kebĂŠrĂŠt|kebĂŠrĂŠt]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebarat|kekebarat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebĂŠrĂŠt|kekebĂŠrĂŠt]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
